summary: Verified two P0 bug fixes in Balance Sheet for iteration 92. Both bugs are FIXED and working correctly. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All calculations verified via screenshots.
critical_code_review_comments: Code fix in backend/routes/fy_summary.py line 448: Changed 'cr if cr is not None else 5' to handle cutting_rate=0 correctly (nullish coalescing)
Code fix in backend/routes/fy_summary.py line 436: Truck 'paid' now includes deductions (diesel_paid + cash_paid + g_deposite) plus external payments
Same fixes applied in desktop-app/routes/fy_summary.js at lines 305, 315, 448, 452, 596 for consistency
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: Gokul mandi (cutting_rate=0), Barsana (cutting_rate=10), truck OD15A1234 with entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Balance Sheet P0 bugs fixed. Test data: Gokul mandi total=4000 (not 4100), Barsana total=4200, truck OD15A1234 total=14782.72, paid=15904 (includes 5500 deductions + 10404 external). Balance sheet balances at Rs 12,20,850.

bug_1_cutting_rate_zero.description: Mandi target calculation when cutting_rate=0 was defaulting to 5
bug_1_cutting_rate_zero.root_cause: JavaScript/Python || operator treats 0 as falsy, so cutting_rate || 5 defaulted 0 to 5
bug_1_cutting_rate_zero.fix_applied: Changed to nullish check: cr != null ? cr : 5 (Python) and cutting_rate != null ? cutting_rate : 5 (JS)
bug_1_cutting_rate_zero.verification: Gokul mandi with cutting_rate=0 shows total=4000 (not 4100)

bug_2_truck_payments_not_reflected.description: Cash/diesel deductions at entry time not counted as 'Paid' in truck accounts
bug_2_truck_payments_not_reflected.root_cause: Original code: Total=gross-deductions, Paid=external only. Should be: Total=gross, Paid=deductions+external
bug_2_truck_payments_not_reflected.fix_applied: Changed truck_accounts calculation: total=gross, paid=deductions+external_paid, balance=total-paid
bug_2_truck_payments_not_reflected.verification: OD15A1234: total=14782.72 (gross), paid=15904 (5500 deductions + 10404 external), balance=-1121.28
